DATABASE OPERATIONS (ROOT)
PERSONAL HUB
—

Drive Folder Automation

Define where your project folders are created and which template folder is copied.

Selective Native Sync (Physical Sharing)

Select which sub-folders or files from the template should be automatically shared with your Google Drive Desktop.

Template File Renaming ▼

Auto-rename specific files when the template is duplicated.

Rule Editor (Automation Tasks) ▲

Define keywords to search inside an Event Folder, and where to automatically publish them.

Project Assets Reminders

Simple packing reminders shown inside the Project Assets window (e.g. distro, open ends, fixtures).

LOGISTICS HUB

Define your transit timeline and load manifests. Items generated via auto-pack or auto-arrange will be badged with ⚠️ AUTO.

Assign Vehicles (Warehouse ➝ Site)
Assign Vehicles (Site ➝ Warehouse)
(Automatically packs loose items into generic cases)
(Stacks cases into selected Outbound & Inbound vehicles)
Manual Transit Shifts Detected! Time generation is locked to prevent overwriting your manual schedule.

Warehouse ➝ Site

Schedule Mode
Load (WH)SET DEF
Unload (Site)SET DEF

Site ➝ Warehouse

Schedule Mode
Load (Site)SET DEF

The database will start backing up in
20
seconds.
Please save your work. The interface will be locked during the backup.
—
Live RFID scans
Waiting for scans…
Scan equipment to select
Waiting for host
Scan your crew badge
HANDHELD
Projects
Station setup
Display
Session
The device stays logged in — only the hosted crew member is ejected.
Saves battery — the gun powers down after this long with no reads. Pull the trigger to wake it, then tap Reconnect gun.
After host signs out, the gun stays connected for this long, then parks (SDK disconnect + short beep). Pull trigger to wake and reconnect.
Extra wait after grace before the disconnect beep and SDK park (saves gun battery).
Scanner (gun)
—
Lower = shorter range (badge tap only). Higher = reads across the room. Test a value that reads a badge held to the gun but not tags on the shelf.
Single = one tag per pull. Multi = every tag in range on one pull.
Tap preset to load · hold 1s to save current sensitivity
Single reads one tag per trigger pull. Multi reads every tag in range on one pull. Continuous toggles a hands-free burst (pull to start, pull again to stop).
—
Time between repeat reads in Continuous mode. Left = faster (machine-gun), right = slower / gentler.
Turn off to silence the gun's own beep on every read.
Gun controls appear here when the station app is connected to the RFID gun. (Not available in a plain browser.)
Device info
Gun connection—
Battery—
Firmware—
Use when Bluetooth shows connected but scans do not work — forces a fresh driver handshake.
Powers the gun down (no on/off button on this reader). Pull the trigger to wake it, then tap Reconnect gun.
Signs out this station profile (e.g. CW1) from Showrunner — not the hosted crew member.

STATION DEVICE PROFILES

Fixed gun/tablet logins (e.g. WH-GUN-01). Office crew roles stay in ROLE EDITOR. Chainway handheld first; TL dock + large monitor layout ships separately.

Device layout

COMPARE & MERGE

OFFICIAL SURVIVOR NAME
Select Granular Data

Select the most accurate data for each attribute. The Base Record will survive and inherit these details. Quantities are automatically summed, and the losers are deleted.

Adjust the multiplier for each role. This applies on top of the Standard Phase Rates calculated dynamically from the timeline.
